titleStmt.title: SII 34.68: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 68. Kāmarasavalli, Udaiyarpalayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the west wall of the central shrine in the Kārkōṭakēśvara temple.

summary.p: Gift of land by the madhyastha called Nārāyaṇaṉ Nānūṟṟuvaṉ alias Śrīragavap-peruṅkāviti for the offering of akkāraḍalai on the festival day of Mārgaḻi-tiruvādirai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirumakaḷpOlap perunilaccelviyum taṉakkE Urimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷa kāntaḷūr cālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi kaṅkapāṭiyum vEṅkaināṭum
nuḷampapāṭiyum taṭikaiypāṭiyum kuṭamalai nāṭum taṇṭāl koṇṭu tanneḻil vaḷarūḻiyuḷ ḷellāyāṇṭum toḻutaka viḷaṅkum yāṇṭē ceḻiyarait
tēcukoḷ śrī kōvirājarāja rājakēsari panmakkiyāṇṭu 10 5 Āvatu vaṭakarai brahmadeyam śrīkāmaravallic caturvvedimaṅkalattu madyasthan nārāya
ṇa nānūṟṟuvaṉṉāna śrīrākavap peruṅkāvitiyēṉ tirukkāṟkōṭaka Īśvarattu mahādevar mārkaḻit tiruvātirai nāṉṟu tīrttamāṭivantu Amu
tu ceyya vaitta Akkāraṭalaikku paḻavarici kuṟuṇiyum paruppuk kuṟuṇiyum pāl patakkum ney Uriyum caṟkarai Irupatiṉpalamum vāḻaiy
ppaḻam 2 10m Aṭaikkāyamutu pattuppākkum veṟṟilaiyum cantrādittaval Itdevar Amutu ceyvataṟkku koṇṭu kuṭutta nilamāvatu Irāma tēva vatikku mē
ṟku śrītēvi vāykkālukku vaṭakku 10- Āṅkaṇṇāṟṟu 6- Āñcatirattu teṉ mēṟku 2 mā Iraṇṭumāvil mēṟku niṉṟum Aintām taram Araikkāṇiyum Ivvatikku mēṟku Irā
jakēsarivāykkālukku vaṭakku 1 mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟu 6 Āṟāñcatirattu mēṟkaṭaiya 3 māvil tekkaṭaiya 2 Iraṇṭumāvil mēṟkaṭaiya 1 Orumāvum Āka Iṉṉilam Orumā
araikkāṇiyu nāṉ koṇṭu Itdevarkkuk kuṭuttu Ipparicu Ivvakkāraṭalai Idevarkku śrīkāryyañ ceyvārēy kuṟaivaṟuttu Amutu ceyvikka kaṭavarāka [ cantrā] tittaval
Digital edition of SII 34.68 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
